feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S4HC Public - Payment Status
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am missing "setup" for connect my own edited PSR format - PAIN_002_001_03 which I can easy edit in MAP FORMAT DATA - for incoming files from Banks.
But there is issue with original file - because its still using and cant be renamed / replaced...
But where is customization to set this new format /Z_PAIN_002_001_03 for example Sender + Payment message type ?

 


Many thanks with help 🙂

Best regards
Jiri Starek

entry.title: How to Change the Bank Statement Format
entry.content:
Hi!

We have a requirement to change the bank statement format configuration.

We will need to have the link between the external transaction - posting rule - acct symbol and G/L account to know how it will be the new postings with the new bank statement format.

Please, could you provide it to us?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Create Event Consumption Model in On-premise system.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm trying to create an event consumption model by following the steps from the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-event-processing-s4h-onpremise..html

and getting the below error. Could you please help me on resolving this error?

Regards,

Ramesh

entry.title: RMPS_SET_SUBSTITUTE equivalent in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there an equivalent app in Public cloud for transaction RMPS_SET_SUBSTITUTE?

Regards,

 

EDIT: FOUND IT

WORKFLOW ADMINISTRATOR APP

Then Set Substitute option.

entry.title: The statement of changes in owner's equity failed to generate an analysis view
entry.content:
#SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance；1.What is the reason for the failure to generate analytical views for the statement of changes in owner's equity and cash flow statement in SAP；

2.How to activate and configure the analysis views for the statement of changes in owner's equity and cash flow statement that have not been generated

entry.title: Migration of BOM Stimulation Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an error while trying to Upload BOM using XML file. While Stimulation we are getting "Error converting field Quantity 66.150000000000006 "

Please check screenshot also attaching xml migration file.

TypeMessage TitleMessage ClassMessage NumberMessage CountDate and Time

 
Object StatusInvalid entry
Messages for Source Record: A40408, 1710, 1, 1DMC_RT_MSG188101/11/2025, 08:04:50  
 
Object StatusInvalid entry
Error converting field Quantity 66.15000000000000629851101/11/2025, 08:04:50  
 
Object StatusInvalid entry
Error converting field Quantity 8.699999999999999329851101/11/2025, 08:04:50  
 
Object StatusInvalid entry
Records cannot be posted to the target system; see previous messagesDMC_RT_MSG222101/11/2025, 08:04:50

entry.title: Business Partner (A2X) GET: Method REST Service- Supplier Address is missing in the response
entry.content:
Dear All,

Product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

API: Business Partner (A2X)

Method: REST

End Point: https://myXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Supplier?&$filter=CreationDate gt datetime'2024-11-10T00:00:00'

Authentication Method: Basic

I've successfully received the necessary data from SAP; unfortunately, I'm experiencing an issue where the
supplier address and purchase organization details for our business partner (A2X) are not available inthe given response.

Has anyone else encountered a similar problem in the past? Any advice or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

Janarthanan

entry.title: Sap sd
entry.content: Is it possible to set up batch-specific pricing in a sales order in S/4HANA Public Cloud? If so, could you please assist me with the setup? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Reverse Goods issue - Error: Wait until updates of dependant data are completed in LE
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to reverse the goods issue in EWM (SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition) to complete missing serial numbers in the warehouse task but get an error: Wait until updates of dependent data are completed in LE. Due to the data inconsistency the goods issue is completed in EWM but not in ERP. 

Background: I booked the goods issue in EWM without serial numbers but in ERP the serial numbers are needed. 

In Warehouse Monitor - Message Queue I can see my outbound delivery running on error but can't reject/reset the status there. Do you know how can I proceed to solve this issue?

I would be grateful for any advice. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Creating a Product Plant Planning view is not supported when updating an existed Product Master Data
entry.content: Hi Team, I tried to create a Product Plant Supply Planning view when updating a specific Product Master Data through integration api (SAP_COM_0009), but there is no available api provided. Please help to check.

entry.title: No CDS View can retrieve data of Material group in Sales org 2 view
entry.content:
Below fields existed in sales org 2 view in MM01, Which CDS view can retrieve these data?

Material group 1:MVKE-MVGR1

Material group 2:MVKE-MVGR2

Material group 3:MVKE-MVGR3

Material group 4:MVKE-MVGR4

Material group 5:MVKE-MVGR5

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: for billing type - G2 (credit memo) two different types of number range reflected
entry.content:
For billing type - G2 (credit memo) two different types of number range reflected. We need only one number range for credit memo. 

Kindly check below documents for reference,

1) Billing type - G2 (credit memo) - ST40000021 

2) Billing type - G2 (credit memo) - 90000207 

Why two different number range hitted while creating credit memo?

Need root cause for the same.

entry.title: Issue in processing multiple PO in behavior class using MODIFY EML statement
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a requirement to create new entries in existing PO Item-> Pricing Element where the values are passed from a behavior implementation class of a custom table in a loop.

MODIFY EML update statement (to create NEW entries inside a particular po item) works only for last PO in the loop, but not the earlier PO's passed from the loop. Note: COMMIT statement not allowed in a behavior class. I too tried with just hardcoded values outside any loop, by executing MODIFY EML statement twice for different POs one by one. Here too, only the last hardcoded unique PO->PO item-> pricing elements were created in the system.

How to make all POs inserted with new pricing elements when different POs are passed dynamically?

MODIFY EML statement:

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2 PRIVILEGED

ENTITY purchaseorderitem

CREATE BY \_purordpricingelement SET FIELDS WITH VALUE #(

( %key-purchaseorder = 'PO1'

%key-purchaseorderitem = '0010'

%target = VALUE #( (

%cid = |CID{ sy-tabix }|

conditiontype = 'FVA1'

conditionrateamount = '1'

conditioncurrency = 'USD' ) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(mapped_pe1)

FAILED DATA(failed_pe1)

REPORTED DATA(reported_pe1).

 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2 PRIVILEGED

ENTITY purchaseorderitem

CREATE BY \_purordpricingelement SET FIELDS WITH VALUE #(

( %key-purchaseorder = 'PO2'

%key-purchaseorderitem = '0010'

%target = VALUE #( (

%cid = |CID{ sy-tabix }|

conditiontype = 'FVA1'

conditionrateamount = '2'

conditioncurrency = 'USD' ) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(mapped_pe2)

FAILED DATA(failed_pe2)

REPORTED DATA(reported_pe2).

 

In the above code, only the last PO - 'PO2' is getting executed by creating new entries of pricing element in the 'PO2', Line item '0010'.

entry.title: Polish local finance requirement - tax authority related
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

According to our research, there is a complex interaction between value-added tax (VAT) and income tax in Poland . When calculating income tax, Polish companies must adhere to detailed regulations regarding the deductibility of various costs, such as interest expenses and foreign exchange gains and losses. The tax authorities require that the costs related to taxable and non-taxable activities (KUP/NKUP) be clearly distinguished in the accounting system and that this information be accurately reported in monthly tax returns.

We need your assistance to confirm whether there is holistic standard solution can fullfil the local regulations both in booking and reporting in SAP S/4HANA Public Edition?

Appreciate your feedback!

Br, Bob

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud : Pricing in service Contract
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working with the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud edition. As part of a business requirement, I am creating a service contract using the "Manage Service Contract" app with the item category set as "Service Contract Item."

Could someone please guide me on how pricing is determined in the service contract? Additionally, which app should be used to maintain the pricing condition records for this scenario?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Unable to update telephone number in 'Maintain Business User' App
entry.content:
Cannot change/update Phone number in Maintain business user App.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integrate Custom App Into SAP Fiori Launchpad Issue
entry.content:
Hi all,
I´m trying to publish the ABAP RAP created but when I perform the step to publish the app to the page/space created into S4HC public cloud I´m not able to see it:

It says "Please check if the spaces are assigned to a role with catalogs" but it is already assigned:

The IAM app was created, the custom business catalog has the IAM app assigned to it, the custom business role has the custom business catalog assigned to it but when I try to browse the BC into App Finder I can´t see it.

The BC was created and published because I can see it using Maintain Business Catalog app and I can see it from Eclipse IDE too.

Any tips please?
Links I have used:
Integrate List Report Into SAP Fiori Launchpad | SAP Tutorials
Develop an SAP Fiori Application UI | SAP Help Portal
Add Your App to SAP Fiori Launchpad | SAP Help Portal

Thanks in advance,
Mauricio Predolim

entry.content:
How to create new account group in customizing SAP S/4 HANA cloud ?

entry.title: Maintain Inspection types : Config Node Not Editable for Task List Usage
entry.content:
Maintain Inspection type node is Not editable in Config of Public Cloud.

 

Task list 09 is assigned for inspection type 09 and 08, we have a scenario of Using separate task list for both of the Inspection types.

 

Kindly Provide us a solution.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Planned Delivery Date does not update from WM to ERP - Inbound Delivery - S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If you change a planned delivery date on a PO - Inbound delivery via Change Inbound Deliveries - Deliveries. It does not update the ERP side's Planned Delivery Date. I assume this is not intended as this will have further impacts on MRP such as Manage Material Coverage app. What would be the standard solution for this? Delete the delivery and create new?

We are using Ariba so deleting an inbound delivery and creating new would not be ideal.

 

See Delivery from WM side, via Change Inbound Deliveries - Deliveries. Planned Delivery Date has been changed.

See Delivery Date from ERP side via VL32N (Not updated).
